arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi tipped to succeed Pep Guardiola at Man City
arts.sum: Mazzola believes he could be the man City replace Pep with, even if the Inter legend from the 1960s and 70s hopes Inzaghi stays at San Siro. Italy and Inter Milan legend Sandro Mazzola has tipped Simone Inzaghi to succeed Pep Guardiola as the next manager of Manchester City .
